text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of Curren Chan's second
summer camp, and it's time to prepare for the
biggest race of her career—the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's coming off of a very busy schedule, I
ask how she's doing. In response, she coyly says
that she got through it due to my love for her.
